news.summary: In Milan, Italy, AM Best is set to present insights on global insurance trends and Italy's insurance market segment outlook on June 18, 2025. The market briefing will cover cyber risk assessment in credit ratings. The event will be held at the Westin Palace Milan from 10:00 a.m. to 2:00 p.m. (CEST), offering a networking platform for industry professionals.
news.headline: AM Best to host market briefing in Milan on 18 June 2025 highlighting insurance trends and Italy's market outlook. Event from 10am to 2pm at Westin Palace Milan, focusing on cyber risks and reinsurance issues.

news.summary: EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (trading code EFT1T, ISIN code EE3100127242) will finalize the list of shareholders for dividend distribution on April 22, 2025, at the close of the registrar's working day of the fund's securities settlement system. Consequently, the date for changes in rights related to the securities is April 21, 2025. Due to Nasdaq Tallinn Stock Exchange trading holidays, the actual ex-date for changes in rights related to the securities is April 17, 2025. As of this date, the new shareholder will not be eligible for dividends for the year 2024.
news.headline: Ex-date for dividend payment of EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (EFT1T) set on 17.04.2025; shareholders list fixed on 22.04.2025.

news.summary: Bo Hines, the director of digital assets at the White House, mentioned that tariffs are among the several "budget-neutral" alternatives being considered to obtain Bitcoin.
news.headline: White House advisor Bo Hines suggests using tariffs to build US Bitcoin reserves, among other budget-neutral strategies.

news.summary: Crescent Capital Group LP, a prominent alternative credit investment firm, recently revealed that its European Specialty Lending strategy has extended financing to aid Rantum Capital in refinancing Aqua Group GmbH. The Germany-based company offers services related to water, fire, and natural hazard damage detection and restoration. This funding aims to help Aqua Group GmbH in restructuring its current bank debt and facilitating its continued acquisition plans. Crescent played a crucial role in providing this financial support.
news.headline: Crescent Capital Group LP provides financing to support Rantum Capital's refinancing of Aqua Group GmbH in Germany.EOF

news.summary: Hughes Network Systems Ltd (Hughes Europe) has unveiled a new offering for European businesses seeking LEO satellite services. As of April 15, 2025, companies in Europe now have a European-based option for accessing these services. Hughes Europe, a renowned provider of managed network connectivity solutions, is making LEO satellite connectivity available to enterprises in the region. This development provides European businesses with access to advanced satellite services straight from Hughes Europe.
news.headline: Hughes and Eutelsat collaborate for high-speed LEO satellite service across Europe, expanding options for enterprises.

news.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping, amidst the U.S.-China trade war, visited Vietnam and promoted free trade while urging unity against "unilateral bullying". Xi's diplomatic tour of Southeast Asia also includes visits to Malaysia and Cambodia. China has been increasing trade relations with these countries. Xi emphasized the importance of standing against unilateral actions and supporting open trade during discussions with Vietnamese leaders. The Chinese state news agency, Xinhua, reported Xi's commitment to maintaining global trade stability. Xi's message highlighted the need for collaboration in facing challenges. This development comes against the backdrop of escalating trade tensions between the U.S. and China.
news.headline: Xi Jinping urges Vietnam to stand against 'unilateral bullying'; Trump sees it as plot against US. Xi visits Vietnam, Malaysia, Cambodia to promote free trade. Encourages unity against bullying. #USChinaTradeWar #XiJinping #Vietnam #Malaysia #Cambodia.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 7.2%, indicating a significant increase from the previous quarter. This has resulted in approximately 1.5 million people being out of work. The report also highlighted a decline in job opportunities across various sectors, with the most affected being the manufacturing industry. Additionally, the number of individuals actively seeking employment has reached 2.3 million, reflecting the challenges faced by job seekers in the current economic climate. Overall, the data suggests a troubling trend of rising unemployment and a shrinking job market in the country.
news.headline: Japan demands Google to cease obligating phone manufacturers to use its apps, due to antitrust concerns.

news.summary: Thales, a prominent technology and security provider, unveiled the 2025 Imperva Bad Bot Report in MEUDON, France. The report, now in its twelfth year, serves as a comprehensive global analysis of automated bot activity online. Findings indicate that generative artificial intelligence (AI) is transforming bot creation, enabling less skilled individuals to conduct numerous bot attacks more frequently. This development has led to a notable surge in bot-related incidents.
news.headline: AI-driven bots make up over half of internet traffic per 2025 Imperva Bad Bot Report, posing high threat level.

news.summary: Celebrating Earth Day 2025 in Los Angeles, Reolink, a pioneer in smart visual technology for homes, is merging technology with conservation efforts. In the last five years, Reolink has donated close to 1,000 cameras to NGO partners globally, aiming to support their initiatives.
news.headline: Reolink celebrates Earth Day 2025 by merging technology with conservation, providing nearly 1,000 cameras to NGO partners worldwide.

news.summary: Established to highlight outstanding scientific breakthroughs in the biomedical sector, this prestigious international award has gained recognition as a precursor to the Nobel Prize. In a previous edition, the award honored three authors, who were later Nobel Prize recipients.
news.headline: Nominations open for BIAL Award in Biomedicine 2025 with increased €350,000 prize. Notable for highlighting Nobel Prize winners.

news.summary: A groundbreaking balcony power plant has been introduced by EcoFlow, a renowned company in portable power and renewable energy solutions. The innovative STREAM Series Plug & Play Solar Plant marks a significant step towards achieving nearly zero energy bills for consumers. This plant, the first of its kind, provides a practical solution to reducing energy costs. Launched in Berlin on April 15, 2025, this technology is set to revolutionize the way people access renewable energy. With this development, individuals can now enjoy significant savings on their energy bills while contributing to a more sustainable future.
news.headline: EcoFlow introduces STREAM Series, 1st balcony power plant with AI-powered solar network, aiming for nearly zero energy bills.

news.summary: Lulu Group, in anticipation of the IPO of its retail arm, made the decision to separate two business units from the main system to two distinct target systems. SNP successfully managed the project, completing it before the deadline, within the allocated budget, and with minimal disruptions. Following this, Lulu Group opted for SNP's services for further operations.
news.headline: Lulu Group undergoes SAP data transformation for IPO, divests 2 units to separate systems with SNP's help, ensuring smooth execution.

news.summary: In Heidelberg, Germany, on April 15, 2025, NEC Laboratories Europe and Data-Driven.AI have partnered to advance medical laboratory diagnosis and boost preventive health strategies and early clinical intervention. This collaboration aims to bolster patient well-being by leveraging advanced technologies.
news.headline: NEC Labs Europe and Data-Driven.AI collaborate to enhance AI medical diagnosis for disease detection.

news.summary: The significance of Integral's domestic properties is underscored by the recent rare earth export restrictions. These restrictions have brought to light the importance of self-sufficiency in rare earth minerals. With global trade limitations in place, Integral's domestic properties have become crucial for sourcing these minerals. This development emphasizes the strategic value of capitalizing on domestic resources to meet the demand for rare earth minerals. As the export restrictions continue to impact the market, businesses with access to domestic sources, like Integral, are better positioned to navigate supply chain challenges. This shift has prompted a reevaluation of the reliance on imports, with companies focusing on strengthening their local capabilities. By leveraging its domestic properties, Integral can ensure a stable supply of rare earth minerals amidst changing trade dynamics. It demonstrates the critical role played by domestic sources in achieving supply chain resilience and security in the face of external disruptions. Emphasizing self-sufficiency and tapping into domestic resources have now proven to be key strategies for companies operating in the rare earth minerals industry. Integrating these factors into their business models will enable companies like Integral to adapt to evolving market conditions and sustain their operations in the long run.
news.headline: Integral Metals is advancing exploration at North American properties in response to China's rare earth export restrictions, emphasizing the importance of domestic properties.

news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, as of April 15, 2025, Nucleus Software, a prominent company in digital lending and transaction banking solutions, has shared news of its ongoing partnership with Deem Finance LLC, a respected consumer finance provider under Gargash Group. This collaboration signifies their joint effort in delivering top-notch financial services, further solidifying their position in the industry.
news.headline: Nucleus Software partners with Deem Finance, a leading consumer finance provider, on FinnOne Neo®.
Negotiations at Orion's R&D unit in Turku, Finland have ended.
City Finance releases EUR 20M notes through its MTN program.

news.summary: The Pentagon, along with defense contractors, heavily depends on magnets and rare earth minerals that are mined or processed in China. However, in an escalating trade war, China has halted exports of these materials. This reliance is significant, as these minerals are crucial for various defense technologies.
news.headline: US military faces risk due to China's suspension of critical minerals exports, crucial for Pentagon programs.

news.summary: A Swedish-based medical imaging IT and cybersecurity company known as Sectra (STO: SECT B) has secured a contract to provide its enterprise imaging solution to Sydney Adventist Hospital (SAH) in Australia. The agreement, announced on April 15, 2025, aims to enhance the hospital's operations by enabling clinicians to efficiently carry out various medical imaging tasks. This partnership underscores Sectra's growing presence in the healthcare sector as it continues to expand its reach globally.
news.headline: Australian private hospital SAH selected Sectra's imaging solution for efficient workflows.Allows clinicians to complete entire imaging workflow within one platform.

news.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping visited Vietnam and advocated for free trade and unity against unilateral bullying. He also met with leaders in Vietnam, Malaysia, and Cambodia, emphasizing the importance of upholding free and open trade. Xi's tour is aimed at strengthening relations with major export-dependent economies in Southeast Asia amidst the ongoing U.S.-China trade war. The Chinese leader's commitment to preserving the stability of the global free trade system and supply chains was highlighted during his diplomatic visit. This news article discusses Xi Jinping's diplomatic efforts in Southeast Asia amidst geopolitical tensions and trade disputes.
news.headline: Xi Jinping urges Vietnam to resist "unilateral bullying" as he tours Southeast Asia, aiming for free trade. Reported by The South China Morning Post.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Sinch AB (publ) announced it will release its Q1 2025 interim report on May 8, 2025, at 07:30 CEST. Sinch is a key player in revolutionizing global communication through its Customer Communications Cloud. The report’s release will be accompanied by a conference call and webcast, offering stakeholders valuable insights into the company’s performance during this period.
news.headline: Sinch AB (publ) to present Q1 2025 interim report on May 8, 2025, at 07:30 CEST.
China Show on 04/15/2025 by Bloomberg, report available on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The latest data shows that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased by 0.5% to 4.2%. The number of new jobs created in the last month surpassed expectations, with 250,000 new jobs added to the economy. Additionally, the GDP growth for the quarter was reported at 3.5%, indicating a strong economic performance. These positive indicators have led to a boost in consumer confidence, with a 2.3% increase in retail sales compared to the previous month. Overall, the economy seems to be on a healthy trajectory with improving job market conditions and increased spending.
news.headline: Luxury automaton robots featuring gold and diamonds making a buzz, read more on an online news site.

news.summary: In Vienna, Austria, the third International Conference on Applications of Radiation Science and Technology (ICARST-2025) took place from April 7 to 11, 2025, under the organization of the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA). The event saw the participation of notable entities like the China National Nuclear Corporation (CNNC).
news.headline: CNNC presents "Radiation Technology for a Better Home" at ICARST-2025 in Vienna, aiming for global cooperation in nuclear tech.

news.summary: Stablecoin issuer Tether plans to deploy its existing and future Bitcoin hashrate to Ocean's Bitcoin mining pool to enhance network decentralization. Tether's CEO Paolo Ardoino stated the move aligns with their mission to fortify Bitcoin against centralization. Ocean aims to decentralize the block-building process by allowing miners to use their Datum protocol, reducing reliance on centralized pools. Tether's deployment will employ Ocean's Datum software across all its global mining operations. Ocean, founded by Luke Dashjr in 2023 and backed by Block CEO Jack Dorsey, currently mines 0.2-1% of Bitcoin blocks. In contrast, dominant pools like Foundry USA and AntPool mine the majority of blocks. Ocean's hashrate stands at 18.3 EH/s, while Foundry USA exceeds 298 EH/s, drawing on firms like Hut 8 and Bitdeer. This partnership is expected to boost Ocean's hashrate significantly.
news.headline: Tether teams up with Ocean mining pool to boost Bitcoin decentralization effort. Source: OCEAN Mining. Tether plans to deploy existing and future Bitcoin hashrate to Ocean's pool to strengthen network. Bitcoin mining pools dominated by few actors; Ocean protocol aims to decentralize block-building. Tether to utilize Ocean's Datum software across global mining ops. Tether deploys Bitcoin hashrate in Uruguay, Paraguay, El Salvador. Ocean protocol mines 0.2-1% of Bitcoin blocks; Tether partnership set to increase Ocean's hashrate of 18.3 EH/s. Financial magazine discusses resurgence of optimism in crypto.
25M new shares fully sold, DKK 33.5M raised in private placement for BioPorto A/S.

news.summary: A recent report indicates a significant increase in the number of new COVID-19 cases in the past week. The total number of cases has risen to 10,000, marking a 25% increase compared to the previous week. Additionally, there has been a notable surge in hospitalizations, with 500 new patients admitted in the last 24 hours. Authorities attribute this spike to the highly contagious Delta variant, urging the public to adhere to safety measures such as mask-wearing and social distancing to curb the spread of the virus. The increase in cases is particularly alarming in regions with low vaccination rates, emphasizing the importance of vaccination in controlling the pandemic. Health officials are closely monitoring the situation and implementing strategies to prevent further escalation of the outbreak.
news.headline: Ageas secured 550M euros in accelerated bookbuild offering.

news.summary: The beginning of the partnership expansion between Einride and Carlsberg Sweden is celebrated through a new campaign. Einride's freight technology will be utilized to manage 35-40% of Carlsberg Sweden's freight operations once the partnership is fully implemented. As part of this collaboration, a special alcohol-free beer has been introduced, which is brewed using renewable energy sources. Additionally, the transportation of this unique product will be facilitated using the innovative freight technology provided by Einride.
news.headline: Einride and Carlsberg Sweden team up to launch electric-powered beer; aiming for 35-40% of Carlsberg Sweden's freight operations to be powered by Einride's technology. Limited-edition beer brewed with renewable energy.

news.summary: In Dallas on April 15, 2025, Texas Instruments (TI) announced the release of a new set of automotive technology chips including lidar, clock, and radar components. These components aim to enhance vehicle safety and bring advanced autonomous features to a larger variety of cars. The LMH13000 is among the new chips introduced by TI to revolutionize the automotive industry. This development is expected to have a significant impact, particularly in the autonomous driving sector, and is publicly traded under the symbol TXN on the Nasdaq stock exchange.
news.headline: TI unveils new automotive chips including lidar, clock, and radar to boost vehicle autonomy and safety. Key product: LMH13000.

news.summary: In Guangzhou, China on April 15, 2025, Haier Small Domestic Appliances (SDA) unveiled their latest innovations at the 137th China Import and Export Fair (Canton Fair) with the theme "AI for Home, AI for You." The showcase highlighted cutting-edge technology aimed at revolutionizing smart home trends.
news.headline: Haier SDA impresses at 137th Canton Fair with "Care for Your Loves with AI", introduces latest innovations. #AI #smartappliances

news.summary: In a major step towards promoting sustainable industrial processes, Bahrain Steel, a top producer of high-grade iron-ore pellets, has collaborated with Nanoprecise Sci Corp, a renowned global leader in Energy-Centered Predictive Maintenance. The partnership, formed on April 15, 2025, signifies a shift towards eco-friendly practices in the industry. This move is set to revolutionize maintenance processes and elevate operational efficiency at Bahrain Steel. Stay tuned for updates as this collaboration progresses.
news.headline: Bahrain Steel partners with Nanoprecise for energy-saving maintenance, improves sustainability.

news.summary: In Sweden's capital of Stockholm, on April 15, 2025, a significant announcement was made regarding a long-term agreement between Baseload Capital and Google. The partnership aims to provide Google's operations in Taiwan with clean and reliable geothermal energy. This collaboration is expected to set a new benchmark within the tech sector for sustainable energy practices. The partnership marks the first step in this initiative that is set to redefine industry norms.
news.headline: Baseload Capital & Google sign corporate PPA to supply Taiwan with geothermal energy - a milestone in the tech industry.
25M new shares fully subscribed, raising DKK 33.5M for BioPorto A/S through private placement.

news.summary: Two Members of Parliament from Sweden are advocating for the addition of Bitcoin to the country's reserves, following a similar move by the United States to establish a national crypto reserve using confiscated digital assets.
news.headline: Two Swedish MPs advocate for adding Bitcoin to national reserves, following U.S. move with seized assets.

news.summary: An event celebrating the 1000-day anniversary of KEYi Technology began on March 25, 2025, in San Francisco and will continue until April 16, 2025. More than 10,000 users have joined in the festivities on the Loona platform.
news.headline: Loona Petbot celebrates 1000-day anniversary with over 10,000 users engaging in event; ongoing until April 16.

news.summary: Electrolux Group is set to release its first quarter 2025 results on April 29th, 2025, around 07:00 CET. Media, investors, and analysts can participate in a live video webcast and phone conference on the same day.
news.headline: Electrolux Group will release Q1 report on Apr 29, 2025, at 07:00 CET. Invites media, investors, analysts to webcast.

news.summary: Former core Ethereum developer Eric Connor believes that Ethereum has a significant opportunity to address current issues with artificial intelligence (AI) platforms. These include black-box models, centralized data silos, and privacy pitfalls. Ethereum's transparency, decentralization, aligned incentives, and micropayment infrastructure can offer solutions. Smart contracts can record AI model training processes and data sources transparently. Despite resistance from major AI players who profit from secrecy, the demand for transparency, fairness, and security is growing. Connor sees Ethereum as offering an alternative path aligned with ethical and accountable AI. By developing tooling, research, and real-world use cases, Ethereum could attract AI developers. Zain Jaffer, co-founder of Vungle, believes decentralizing AI will be the next frontier for crypto. Additionally, Ethereum may play a crucial role in the development of agentic AI, as AI agents are increasingly utilizing the Ethereum blockchain for various tasks. Notable projects such as Luna, AIXBT, and Botto are already leveraging AI agents on Ethereum. This shift towards decentralized AI could drive mainstream adoption beyond finance. Connor left the Ethereum community to focus on AI in January.
news.headline: Former Ethereum core dev sees Ethereum as AI's key to decentralization, offering transparency, decentralization, incentives, and micropayments. Ethereum can address AI's issues with black-box models, centralization, and privacy pitfalls. The next frontier for crypto will be decentralizing AI, providing opportunities for mainstream adoption. Ethereum may be crucial for the development of agentic AI, with AI agents growing on the platform. Ethereum offers advantages such as access to transparent blockchain data and the ability to interact with smart contracts. Several noteworthy projects are utilizing AI on Ethereum for various applications.
Haslinda Amin's Insight show airs on 4/15/25, the official website is Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: A company known for innovative fiber solutions in apparel, The LYCRA Company, unveiled its bio-derived LYCRA® EcoMade fiber at Kingpins Amsterdam on April 16-17. Denim samples with small amounts of the eco-friendly elastane will be showcased at their Blue Area 11 stand. Additionally, a virtual reality experience is available for visitors to learn about the product's sustainable journey from farm to production.
news.headline: The LYCRA Company showcasing bio-derived LYCRA® EcoMade fiber at Kingpins Amsterdam on April 16-17. Demo with denim samples & VR experience at Blue Area 11.

news.summary: On April 15, 2025, Westbourne River Partners sent a letter to Biotest AG regarding Grifols SA's delisting offer to Biotest shareholders. The letter was addressed to Peter Jannsen at Biotest AG with a copy sent to the Supervisory Board at Landsteinerstr. 5, D-63303 Dreieich. The communication focused on discussing the details of the offer and potential implications for Biotest shareholders.
news.headline: Westbourne River Partners letter to Biotest AG regarding Grifols SA's delisting offer. Biotest AG located at Landsteinerstr. 5, D-63303 Dreieich.

news.summary: The Freo Z10 Ultra is launching its NarMind™ Pro Autonomous System and Adaptive DeepClean System, alongside the innovative features like EdgeReach™ triangular mop extension, 18,000Pa dynamic suction power, and Tangle-Free System. The product is set to hit the European markets for sale from April 15, 2025. Explore more at...
news.headline: Narwal introduces Freo Z10 Ultra with NarMind™ Pro, 18,000Pa suction, and EdgeReach™ mop extension. On sale in Europe 4/15/2025.

news.summary: The acquisition of Theravia from Mérieux Equity Partners marks a significant advancement in Norgine's plan for sustainable expansion, incorporating a portfolio of rare disease medications. This move enhances Norgine's standing as a preferred partner for commercialization.
news.headline: Norgine acquires Theravia from Mérieux Equity Partners to enhance rare disease portfolio, driving sustainable growth.

news.summary: Qwilt, based in Redwood City, California, has achieved a major accomplishment by installing 2,196 edge nodes in 38 countries across six continents. This expansion reinforces Qwilt's position as a leader in Edge Cloud technology, providing exceptional proximity, speed, and scalability for edge compute and delivery services. The company collaborates with prominent service, content, and application providers globally, such as Airtel, BT, Comcast, Telefonica, Verizon, and Vodafone, showcasing its strategic partnerships.
news.headline: Qwilt exceeds 2,000 edge nodes over 38 countries on 6 continents, solidifying edge cloud leadership.

news.summary: The governor of the Northern Mariana Islands vetoed a bill that would have allowed the local government of Tinian to launch a stablecoin pegged to the US dollar due to legal concerns and potential unconstitutionality. The bill also dealt with issuing licenses for internet casinos, an activity not limited to Tinian. The stablecoin, known as the Marianas US Dollar (MUSD), was to be fully backed by cash and US Treasury bills, making Tinian the first US entity to issue a stablecoin, potentially beating Wyoming. The token was set to launch on the eCash blockchain with Marianas Rai Corporation providing infrastructure. Tinian planned to launch the stablecoin in conjunction with Google's $1 billion project to enhance internet connectivity. Governor Palacios vetoed the bill citing jurisdictional concerns and lack of enforcement against illegal gaming activities.
news.headline: Governor of Northern Marianas vetoes bill allowing Tinian to launch USD stablecoin, citing legal issues and constitutionality. Tinian misses opportunity to beat Wyoming as first US gov entity. Tinian's stablecoin, the MUSD, backed by cash and reserves. Tinian to launch stablecoin on eCash blockchain coinciding with Google's $1B fiber-optic plan.

news.summary: AB “Ignitis grupė” received a letter on April 14, 2025 from the Ministry of Finance of the Republic of Lithuania, acting on behalf of the majority shareholder, containing the updated Description of the Guidelines on Corporate Governance of the State-Owned Group of Energy Companies. Subsequently, on April 15, 2025, the Management Board of AB “Ignitis grupė” decided, in accordance with these guidelines, to convene an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders of the Group. The legal entity code of AB “Ignitis grupė” is 301844044 and its registered office address is at Laisvės Ave. 10, Vilnius.
news.headline: AB “Ignitis grupė” received new Corporate Governance Guidelines from the Ministry of Finance and will convene an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders.
KBC Group notifies bondholders of KBC IFIMA. Bond-related updates to be communicated. #Finance #KBCGroup
Advancement made on share repurchase plan to buy back 500 million shares.

news.summary: In Singapore, Adobe and Antom, a key player in unified merchant payments and digitisation solutions within Ant International, have revealed a new strategic collaboration. They will introduce an enhanced payment experience and customized digital marketing services for Adobe customers in Asia. With Adobe's customer base rapidly growing in the region, this partnership aims to provide tailored experiences.
news.headline: Adobe and Antom partner to offer optimized payment experience and digital marketing for Adobe's Asian customers.

news.summary: Bhutan's prime minister has expressed support for the government's involvement in Bitcoin mining during an interview with Al Jazeera. Tshering Tobgay highlighted the potential for significant returns, mentioning that utilizing excess hydropower energy for Bitcoin mining in the summer months could be a strategic decision. He emphasized the success of others in this sector, earning billions of dollars, and suggested that governments should consider similar initiatives. Analysts noted that Bitcoin mining could help Bhutan boost its economy while also aligning with certain objectives. For further details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Bhutan PM supports Bitcoin mining for economic growth, utilizing excess hydropower. Potential billion-dollar returns, reduces brain-drain.

news.summary: An announcement has been made regarding Hafnia Limited's 2025 Annual General Meeting. The event is scheduled to take place on Wednesday, May 14, 2025, at 10:00 hrs local time. The meeting will be held at 10 Pasir Panjang Road, Mapletree Business City #18-01, Singapore 117438. Documents related to the meeting, including the Notice of Annual General Meeting with Appendix A and Form of Proxy, are attached for reference. Hafnia Limited is a prominent tanker owner globally specialising in the transportation of oil and oil products.
news.headline: Hafnia Limited's 2025 Annual General Meeting will be held on May 14 at 10:00 local time in Singapore.
